name: Ben Carson
subject: I need your feedback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
Peter,

As I explore a run for President, I've been spending a lot time
listening, learning, and gathering feedback from people that I
trust.

That includes you, and I need your feedback now.

Please take one minute to answer these three quick questions:

bencarson.com/explore/landing/survey/page-hf

Decision time for me is right around the corner, and your honest
feedback right now would really mean a lot to me.

Thank you for your support and participation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate: bencarson.com/explore/landing/bd/page-hf

Donate by Mail:
camp2016-email.bencarson.com/carson-america-exploratory-committee-contribution-form.pdf

Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.bencarson.com/p/iWA8Tom1Nb

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.bencarson.com/p/oWA8Tom1Nb

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-26217579159-echo3-6F352073D01A178F78A3BC8F8C7ABDBB@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Murphy
subject: We're so proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Big news: Former Florida Chief Financial Officer Alex Sink JUST endorsed Patrick Murphy for U.S. Senate.Friend -- Big news: Former Florida Chief Financial Officer Alex Sink JUST endorsed Patrick Murphy for U.S. Senate. **Take 30 seconds to read Alex Sink 's full-fledged endorsement!** [](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?refcode=ema_2015-04-21_b1_tm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") As Florida's CFO, Alex Sink put partisanship aside to manage our state's finances and worked to ensure all Floridians could achieve the American dream. We're so proud to have Alex's endorsement. **If you agree with Alex, if you believe that Patrick will be a leader we can all be proud of, help keep the momentum going. name: Robby Mook, Hillary for America
subject: You're one of the first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Be part of this from the beginning: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1MTk3MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMjU4Nzc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) Tell me if this describes you:
* You're all in to elect Hillary as our next president.
* You want a campaign built the right way -- from the grassroots.
* You're proud to be one of the first people to get Hillary's back in this race.

Nodding your head?
**Good -- now do more than just nod. Be a Founding Donor of this campaign by chipping in $5 or more:**[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI1MTk3MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMjU4Nzc3S0&mt=2&rj=NTQyMjU4Nzc3S0&rt=0) We've got staff to hire, offices to open, and an infrastructure to set up. You're one of the first people to get on board -- thanks for helping build a campaign that can win.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1MTk3MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMjU4Nzc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1MTk3MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMjU4Nzc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
